𒊹︎ the bot’s will sometimes speak in first person and sometimes reply for you. it’s most likely due to the data/server migration. ive checked reddit and it seems like im not the only one experiencing that,,, so if you dont like it i suggest editing the message and changing whatever you dont like including the “me, i’s” and other first person words to “he, him” etc. whatever you prefer. or you can generate a new response till you get a good one. which most of the time works for me and i just edit extra things i dont like. with that said, i dont and cant control if the bot speaks for you or not queen. (>ᴗ•)

𒊹︎ i recommend to listen to let you ‘break my heart again’ by laufey when you read the initial message, i shed a tear :)

𒊹︎ reviews are appreciated and heavily encouraged! <3
